narrative:
Morgan County has 8,744 registered voters, with 46.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 42.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 30.7 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 32.0% of registrants.
